raw_response:
BOTTLENECK: latency-bound
REASONING: No CUDA kernel is actually launched here—the program only calls `cudaDeviceSynchronize()` and prints a message—so the profiler reports 0.0% occupancy and 0.0% DRAM utilization because there is no GPU work to measure. Since there is no executed kernel, this is not meaningfully memory- or compute-bound; the effective issue is that execution is dominated by the absence of device work rather than any throughput bottleneck.
